visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene is set in a professional studio with a bright yellow backdrop. A woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a white puff-sleeved dress, stands at the center. Two men in white shirts and black ties are kneeling on either side of her on a grey carpeted floor. The studio lighting is even and bright, highlighting their facial expressions. (2) The central character speaks to a lavalier microphone clipped to her dress while using expressive hand gestures. The two men perform synchronized poses behind her. Close-up shots show the woman looking to the side and then directly at the camera with a determined expression. (3) A tray full of colorful, rectangular boxes (various sanitary pads) is presented. The woman gestures towards them as the camera zooms in to show the bright packaging in shades of pink, blue, orange, and yellow. (4) The woman is shown holding and eating various food items, including a burger, donuts, and fried chicken. She smiles broadly, dances energetically, and points upwards. The camera captures her joyful facial expressions and energetic body movements as she transitions between different food items.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我是愛吃東西. (2) [Variety]: 意志力薄弱的. [Variety]: 小鳥胃. [Variety]: 鴕鳥?. (3) [Subtitle]: 愛康團購買了嗎. (4) [Subtitle]: 什麼? 想要把錢省下來買吃的. (5) [Subtitle]: 480片. (6) [Subtitle]: 只要花390元. (7) [Subtitle]: 洗沐用品、衛生棉布. (8) [Slogan]: 省下來的可以買!. [Variety]: 漢堡. (9) [Slogan]: 省下來的可以買!. [Variety]: 甜甜圈. (10) [Slogan]: 省下來的可以買!. [Variety]: 炸雞!!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and 2 male assistants/dancers.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair tied in a high bun, wearing a white midi-length puff-sleeved dress and light pink shoes with white socks.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean indoor studio with a large yellow paper backdrop, grey carpet, and studio lighting rigs visible at the top of the frame.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a fast-paced female voice speaking enthusiastically in Mandarin. The background music is an upbeat, high-tempo pop track with a strong, funky bassline and electronic percussion. (2) A sharp 'Whoosh' sound effect occurs during a visual transition. The music continues with consistent energy. The speaker's pitch is high and expressive, conveying excitement. (3) Subtle cartoonish 'Ding' sound effects emphasize the presentation of the colorful boxes. The female vocal delivery remains rapid and clear. (4) Brief sounds of chewing or crunching are audible as the character interacts with food. Distant laughter from a small group can be heard in the background, adding to the comedic and lighthearted atmosphere. The music remains dominant throughout the end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote 'Icon' sanitary pads by highlighting their cost-effectiveness. The video uses a humorous logic: by saving money on high-quality, affordable pads through group buying, the consumer can afford to buy more delicious food like burgers and donuts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly presents the products, prices, and the brand name '愛康' (Icon) throughout the promotional skit.

high_inference.freeDescribe: An energetic and well-produced short-form ad that uses comedy and lifestyle relatable themes to drive sales.
